channel.title: Live Search on Aaditya Maheshwari
channel.description: Recent content in Live Search on Aaditya Maheshwari

item.title: AngularJS - Live search
item.description: I love to see web pages & apps with the live search feature. In fact, they are perfect for SPAs (Single Page Applications). My MovieFlix app written in MEAN has something similar. I am gonna share something very close to that here. The only difference you’ll notice is the use of scope in angular & where it applies i.e. change & filter. Also, this is not a tutorial post, so don’t expect any explanations here.
